name: Northwest Cheesecake Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker crumbs, sugar, and melted margarine. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch spring form pan.
2. Bake at 325 degrees F. for 10 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cream cheese, sugar, and flour. Mix on medium speed until well blended.
4. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
5. Blend in the sour cream and vanilla.
6. Pour the mixture over the crust.
7. Bake at 450 degrees F. for 10 minutes.
8. Reduce the temperature to 250 degrees F. Continue baking for 1 hour.
9. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan, then cool before removing the rim.
10. Chill thoroughly.
11. Top with cherry pie filling just before serving.
Variation:
Substitute 1 1/2 cups finely chopped nuts and 2 tbsp sugar for graham cracker crumbs and sugar.
